org_constraint: The first sentence must provide background information.

The administrative fragmentation of the Western Roman Empire in the fifth century defined the transition from imperial rule to regional autonomy. Systemic issues like high inflation and reliance on hired soldiers caused the military to lose loyalty to the state. This loss of cohesion resulted in the rise of local nobility and the establishment of distinct feudal domains.<|im_end|>
